New Patient Specials

Risk-free opportunities to experience the benefits of our advanced treatments. No financial commitment required to explore how we can improve your well-being.

Welcome, New Patients

Start Your Journey to Better Health

At Back to Wellness Chiropractic, we're dedicated to helping new patients revitalize their health through natural, personalized care. With over 24 years of experience, our chiropractors use a holistic approach, considering the whole person to craft tailored wellness plans that address your unique needs.

$49
SoftWave Treatment

Initial SoftWave consultation and treatment. Experience acoustic wave therapy that stimulates natural healing, reduces inflammation, and relieves pain — all without medication or surgery.

Book Now
Most Popular
$49
Red Light Therapy

Initial Red Light consultation and treatment. Discover low-level light therapy that supports cellular repair, reduces inflammation, and promotes natural pain relief and recovery.

Book Now
$150
Self-Pay 1st Visit

Comprehensive first-visit package if your insurance does not cover your care. Includes a consultation, examination, X-rays if needed, and an adjustment — everything you need to get started.

Book Now

Why Wait to Feel Better?

There's no financial commitment required to explore how we can improve your well-being. Book your appointment today and start your journey to better health.

Book Your Appointment Today

Questions About Our Specials?

Call us at (314) 394-2093 or request an appointment online.
